title: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
summary_full: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.
summary_public: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.
